productDisplayName: Guess Women Puffy G Black Watch
description: As the perfect gift for your special someone, or a delicious self-indulgence, this watch from guess is fashioned for the woman of style. Snazz up your wardrobe with this delectable piece. Wear it with a simple outfit or a blingy ensemble, for understated class or over-the-top glam. Case diameter: 41 mm Case thickness: 5 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 2 years Metal case with Swarovski crystals encrusted in the bezel GUESS logo in raised font on the white dial Analogue time indication with quartz movement of time display mineral glass over the dial Black leather straps with buckle closure Holes on the strap for a customised Fit Screw to reset time Waterproof up to 30 metres usable while washing hands or in mild rain Comes in original Guess box
